title: Retextured LU 1972 Stock
description: Minecraft Transit Railway LU 1972 Stock retextured from the LU 1995 Stock.
body:
This resourcepack adds the LU 1972 Stock into Minecraft Transit Railway.
The LU 1972 stock is a retexture of the LU 1995 stock which comes with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

Disclaimers:
This resourcepack does not come with sound.
This resourcepack does not have pocket doors on the train since this is just a retexture.
